Public Meetings

Find agendas and reports for the City Council, Planning Commission, and other public bodies. Public meetings are open to the public. You are welcome to share your opinions and ideas. You can watch online or attend in-person. 

What to Expect
How to Participate
Watch Live
Public notices

Types of Meetings

City Council
Planning Commission
Finance Committee
Parks, Open Spaces & Lanes Committee
Historic Preservation Committee
Beach Road Stabilization Project Oversight Subcommittee
